emailTemplates.title: Email Templates
emailTemplates.subtitle: Configure global styling and logos for automated outgoing emails.

branding.title: Branding
branding.intro: Customize how your workspace looks to your team and customers.
branding.supportEmailHint: Shown to customers in emails and the portal

retention.title: Data retention
retention.intro: Configure how long data is retained before automatic archival or deletion. Changes require backend worker support.
retention.auditHint: Logs older than this are compressed and archived
retention.ticketHint: Closed tickets older than this are moved to cold storage
retention.attachmentHint: File attachments deleted after this period
retention.autoDeleteHint: Permanently delete data when retention period expires (irreversible)
retention.autoDeleteWarning: Auto-delete is enabled. Data will be permanently deleted after the retention period. This cannot be undone.
retention.stub: Backend retention worker runs nightly — config persisted locally until connected

sso.title: SSO / SCIM
sso.description: Connect your Identity Provider for Single Sign-On and automate user provisioning with SCIM.
sso.scimDescription: Automatically provision/deprovision users from your IdP

features.ssoDesc: Okta, Google Workspace, Microsoft Azure AD, and generic SAML 2.0 support.
features.scimDesc: Automatically provision and deprovision users directly from your IdP.
features.jitDesc: New users are created on first login — no manual invite needed.

danger.title: Danger Zone
danger.deleteOrgWarning: This action is irreversible. All data will be permanently deleted.
danger.confirmDelete: Type the organization name to confirm
danger.deactivateOrgDesc: Suspend access for all members. Data is retained. Can be re-activated by a super admin.
danger.deactivateWarning: This will immediately suspend access for all organization members.
danger.exportDesc: Download a full export of all organization data as a ZIP archive.

emailSignatures.title: Email Signatures
emailSignatures.description: Create and manage email signatures for your organization and agents.

emailBranding.title: Email Templates Branding
emailBranding.description: Customize the look and feel of all automated notifications and emails sent by your organization.
emailBranding.fontFamilyHint: The default font used in your emails.
emailBranding.removeHelpdeskBrandingHint: Remove "Powered by Helpdesk" from email footers.

createModal.selectPermissions: Select the permissions this role should have.
createModal.failedPermissions: Role created, but permissions failed to save

deleteModal.title: Delete Role
deleteModal.confirm: Delete "{{name}}"? All associated permissions will also be removed. Cannot be undone.
